Card loan growth expectations of 6% or slightly more unchanged

analyst_thesis.bull_case: JPMorgan's dominant position, strong deposit base, and diversified business model support long-term value creation. Stock appreciated ~29.4% since March 2025, reflecting robust earnings and upward NII guidance. EPS upside (Q1 beat by 8.2%) and positive financial trajectory for 2025-2026.
analyst_thesis.bear_case: Regulatory capital proposals and cyber risks remain key uncertainties. Some investment firms reducing holdings, indicating divided outlook. Credit costs and competition could pressure margins. Net profit margin of 20.66% may be challenged if NII growth slows.

data_quality.notes: Business segment revenue data limited to Markets subsegments for Q1 2026; full segment breakdown not available from materials. Guidance from earnings call transcript and analyst reports consistent. Some numbers from third-party sources may vary by methodology.
